notes:
Doesn't start, I see a black screen flashing for an instant and after that Steam thinks it is running but I can't see it. When opening the system monitor I can only find an entry for a CrashReportClient.exe which disappears after a while together with Steam stopping to show that the game would be running.
Tried PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 and PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 to no avail (PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 wouldn't make sense as a minimum system requirement of the game is DirectX11).
title: Layers of Fear 2

notes: Game won't launch without setting launch option "-onethread", also videos are skipped.
title: Layers of Fear 2

notes: Working fine if you have -onethread in launch options on STEAM. Game is not playable becuse cutscenes ingame not working even if you install everything you need. "they say"..
title: Layers of Fear 2

notes: Game is playable now without launch options, but videos are not played. Manually installing media foundation fixes the videos, rating this silver because those are not freely distributable files and IMO goes beyond a tweak.
title: Layers of Fear 2
